title: Lehmer's Box
description: A golden floor and an angle lattice that confine spectral emission away from Salem numbers — without resolving Lehmer's problem. Companion to the Emission-Gap Theorem and λ = 2c.

title: Lehmer's Problem: An Introduction
description: A question first asked in 1933, still unresolved: the Mahler measure, Lehmer's number 1.17628…, Smyth & Dobrowolski, and why the reciprocal/Salem case is the open heart — explained from the ground up.
